zh.lifeSummary: 當William Copledike of Harington於1402年出生在英國英格蘭波藍德哈靈頓時，他的父親Sir John Copledike42歲，母親Alice40歲。他於1423年與Elinore Hawley結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1485年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾哈靈頓享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Copledike of Harington于1402年出生在英国英格兰波藍德哈靈頓时，他的父亲Sir John Copledike42岁，母亲Alice40岁。他于1423年与Elinore Hawley结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1485年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾哈靈頓享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Copledike of Harington was born in 1402, in Harrington, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Copledike, was 42 and his mother, Alice, was 40. He married Elinore Hawley in 1423. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1485, in Harrington, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Copledike of Harington est né en 1402, à Harrington, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Copledike, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Alice, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Elinore Hawley en 1423. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1485, à Harrington, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Copledike of Harington 1402 in Harrington, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Copledike 42 und seine Mutter Alice 40. Er hat 1423 Elinore Hawley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1485 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Harrington, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Copledike of Harington è nato il nel 1402 nel Harrington, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Copledike, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Alice, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Elinore Hawley nel 1423. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1485, nel Harrington, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Copledike of Haringtonが1402年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドハーリントンで生まれた時，父Sir John Copledikeは42歳，母Aliceは40歳であった。1423年にElinore Hawleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1485年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアハーリントンで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Copledike of Harington(이)가 1402년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 해링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Copledike(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1423년 Elinore Hawley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 해링턴에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Copledike of Harington nasceu em 1402, em Harrington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Copledike, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Alice, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Elinore Hawley em 1423. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1485, em Harrington, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Copledike of Harington родился в 1402 г. в местности харрингтон, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Copledike было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Alice, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Elinore Hawley в 1423 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1485 г. в местности харрингтон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Copledike of Harington nació en 1402, en Harrington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Copledike, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Alice, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Elinore Hawley en 1423. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1485, en Harrington, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 83 años.
